ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pools" (
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the pool (e.g., Factory V1 Meta, Factory V2) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pool (e.g., GOLD/BSD, cbETH/ETH) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the pool (e.g., GBSD, cbETH/ETH) */,
  "pool_address" TEXT /* Address of the pool's smart contract */,
  "decoded" TEXT /* Decoded status of the pool */,
  "dune_namespace" TEXT /* Namespace for Dune Analytics */,
  "dune_table_name" TEXT /* Table name in Dune Analytics */,
  "mid_fee" REAL /* Mid fee for the pool */,
  "out_fee" REAL /* Out fee for the pool */,
  "token_address" TEXT /* Address of the token contract */,
  "deposit_contract" TEXT /* Address of the deposit contract */,
  "gauge_contract" TEXT /* Address of the gauge contract */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the pool was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the pool */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pool (e.g., active, paused, archived) */,
  "total_liquidity" REAL /* Total liquidity in the pool */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* Volume of trades in the past 24 hours */,
  "price_impact" REAL /* Price impact of trades in the pool */,
  "oracle_address" TEXT /* Address of the oracle contract used for price feeds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the token's smart contract */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the token (e.g., Gold, USD Coin) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the token (e.g., GBSD, USDC) */,
  "decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the token */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the token */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the token */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the token */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the token price (e.g., oracle, exchange) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pool_tokens" (
  "pool_token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pool-token relationship */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pool */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the token in the pool (e.g., 0, 1) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the token in the pool */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the token in the pool */,
  "reserve" REAL /* Reserve amount of the token in the pool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pool_tokens_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pool_tokens_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "underlying_tokens" (
  "underlying_token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each underlying token */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the underlying token's smart contract */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the underlying token (e.g., Gold, USD Coin) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the underlying token (e.g., GBSD, USDC) */,
  "decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the underlying token */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the underlying token */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the underlying token */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the underlying token */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the underlying token price (e.g., oracle, exchange) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("underlying_token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pool_underlying_tokens" (
  "pool_underlying_token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pool-underlying token relationship */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pool */,
  "underlying_token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the underlying token */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the underlying token in the pool (e.g., 0, 1) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the underlying token in the pool */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the underlying token in the pool */,
  "reserve" REAL /* Reserve amount of the underlying token in the pool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_underlying_token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pool_underlying_tokens_underlying_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("underlying_token_id") REFERENCES underlying_tokens ("underlying_token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pool_underlying_tokens_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, admin, auditor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the trade */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pool where the trade occurred */,
  "amount_in" REAL /* Amount of tokens traded in */,
  "amount_out" REAL /* Amount of tokens traded out */,
  "traded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "slippage" REAL /* Slippage of the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "oracle_price" REAL /* Oracle price at the time of the trade */,
  "price_impact" REAL /* Price impact of the trade */,
  "network_fee" REAL /* Network fee paid for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade associated with the transaction */,
  "tx_hash" TEXT /* Transaction hash */,
  "tx_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., success, pending, failed) */,
  "tx_amount" REAL /* Amount of tokens involved in the transaction */,
  "tx_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Gas used for the transaction */,
  "gas_price" REAL /* Gas price for the transaction */,
  "from_address" TEXT /* Address from which the transaction was sent */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* Address to which the transaction was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade associated with the fee */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee charged */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., mid_fee, out_fee) */,
  "fee_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the fee charge */,
  "network_fee" REAL /* Network fee charged for the trade */,
  "liquidity_provider_fee" REAL /* Fee paid to liquidity providers */,
  "protocol_fee" REAL /* Fee retained by the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pool_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pool */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration (e.g., string, integer, float) */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pool_configurations_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pool_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pool */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., volume, liquidity) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., on-chain, off-chain) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the metric */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pool_metrics_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pool_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pool */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed on the pool */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pool_access_logs_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smart_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smart contract */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the smart contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of the smart contract (e.g., pool, token, gauge) */,
  "contract_name" TEXT /* Name of the smart contract */,
  "contract_description" TEXT /* Description of the smart contract */,
  "abi" TEXT /* ABI (Application Binary Interface) of the smart contract */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the contract is verified on a blockchain explorer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the contract was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smart_contracts_address FOREIGN KEY ("address") REFERENCES pools ("pool_address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smart_contracts_address FOREIGN KEY ("address") REFERENCES tokens ("address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smart_contracts_address FOREIGN KEY ("address") REFERENCES underlying_tokens ("address")
)
